title: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on a baroque works pair attacks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks. Sanji’s fight with Bon Clay reaches its decisive point as loyalty, deception, and raw strength collide. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Ngh... I've just about had it up to here with your games...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: As much as I'd loooove to play around with you some more, I'm afraid I haven't got the time!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I've got myself a princess to kill, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: So I do believe it's time to finish you off for good!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll spin until my very passion burns through these slippers!

summary: This part develops a baroque works pair attacks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
